one_time_description: Annual surplus from partnerships - Supercom Industries LP ($911,739) and Bamkushwada Limited Partnership ($71,984), newly recognized in 2020 under modified equity method
economic_notes: Michipicoten First Nation has partnered with five other First Nations to participate in electrical transmission projects connecting their communities to the provincial grid. Investments include Bamkushwada Limited Partnership (16.67%) and Supercom Industries LP (16.67%). Also holds investment in Argonaut Gold Inc. (publicly traded, market value $545,654).
notes: Consolidated entity includes First Nation of Michipicoten Cultural Association and Michipicoten First Nation Economic Development Corporation (fully consolidated). Bamkushwada Limited Partnership and Supercom Industries LP are accounted for on modified equity basis. Total government transfers calculated as Canada ($1,606,656) + Ontario ($245,622) + Ontario First Nations (2008) Limited Partnership ($868,139) = $2,720,417. OSR includes Michipicoten First Nation trusts, Aboriginal organizations, and Rentals/interest/other. Partnership surpluses of $983,723 are a new item in 2020 with no prior year equivalent. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $1,391,750 to $2,403,596.
